explanations.16: This sets the user ID and group ID for the container; the ${UID:-1000} syntax means use the UID environment variable if it exists, otherwise default to 1000.
explanations.20: This mounts your local './site_joomla' folder into the container at '/var/www/html' so changes you make locally appear inside the container.
explanations.28: This is a health check that runs the mysqladmin ping command inside the container to verify the database is responding.
explanations.32: Like line 16, this sets the user ID and group ID for the MySQL container to match your host user.
explanations.36: This mounts your local './db' folder into the container at '/var/lib/mysql' so the database files persist even if the container stops.
